section_name: Operation of Vehicle on Dune Seaward of Dune Protection Line Prohibited
text:
(a) In this section, “vehicle” means a device that is designed to transport persons or property and is self-propelled or propelled by external means.

(b) A person commits an offense if the person operates a vehicle on a sand dune seaward of the dune protection line as defined in Section 63.012 (Location of Dune Protection Line) , Natural Resources Code, except on a roadway designated by a subdivision of the state.

(c) An offense under this section is a Class C misdemeanor.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 750. Misc. Provisions
##### § 750.003 — Operation of Vehicle on Dune Seaward of Dune Protection Line Prohibited

(a) In this section, “vehicle” means a device that is designed to transport persons or property and is self-propelled or propelled by external means.

(b) A person commits an offense if the person operates a vehicle on a sand dune seaward of the dune protection line as defined in Section 63.012 (Location of Dune Protection Line) , Natural Resources Code, except on a roadway designated by a subdivision of the state.

(c) An offense under this section is a Class C misdemeanor.

*Added by Acts 2001, 77th Leg., ch. 176, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 2001.*

subsections.label: c
subsections.text: An offense under this section is a Class C misdemeanor.
